sub_modules.fp_unpack: Unpack IEEE-754 operand into sign, exponent, mantissa and detect special cases
sub_modules.fp_mul_exp: Multiply mantissas and compute unbiased exponent sum, forward flags
sub_modules.fp_normalize: Normalize the 48-bit product, extract mantissa, guard/round/sticky bits, adjust exponent
sub_modules.fp_round: Round normalized mantissa to nearest-even, adjust exponent on mantissa overflow
sub_modules.fp_pack: Pack sign, exponent and mantissa into IEEE-754 result, handle all special cases
